name: Solo Fox
short_description: 🌧️ Solo Fox is a heartfelt story of courage and the search for home. Guide Solo, a brave little fox, through flooded forests, crumbling cliffs, and forgotten lands. A vibrant pixel world, mysterious locations, and a cozy, nostalgic atmosphere will make this journey truly unforgettable!
detailed_description:
FIND HMUR!


About the Game

🌧️ The rains never stopped. Meadows have turned into swamps, rivers have overflowed their banks, and familiar paths have vanished beneath the rushing currents. The home you once knew is gone. But even the smallest fox can embark on a great journey.

Solo Fox is an emotional pixel adventure about loss, resilience, and the search for a new beginning. Venture into a vivid world filled with danger and discovery—landslides, broken bridges, ancient ruins, and places untouched for centuries. Each step forward is a test of courage, each obstacle a challenge to overcome.

The world may seem unforgiving, but even among the ruins, beauty remains. The forest still whispers, the air carries the scent of rain, and soft light breaks through the stormy skies. There is only one way to go—forward, toward a new home, a new life, and a new adventure.

Solo Fox is more than just a game. It's a journey you'll take side by side with Solo.

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian
